scan_rules.rule_1_production_code_strict_scan: Scan all production code files, check allowlist, check context, record violations
scan_rules.rule_2_test_code_contextual_scan: Scan all test code files, check test file name allowance, check implementation context
scan_rules.rule_3_documentation_section_scan: Scan all documentation files, detect section by heading, check allowed section

violation_severity_levels.high: Forbidden terms in production code runtime contexts, RUNTIME_PASS evidence, runtime documentation
violation_severity_levels.medium: Forbidden terms in test code runtime contexts, CONTRACT_PASS evidence explanations, planning documentation
violation_severity_levels.low: Forbidden terms in test file names (allowed), fake service implementations (allowed), allowed documentation sections

scan_output_format.violation_output: file_path, line_number, term, context, violation_type, severity, line_content
scan_output_format.report_output: scan_timestamp, total_files_scanned, total_violations, violations, term_counts, context_counts, compliance_status

gate_integration: RGF-004: Artifact redline scan extends source redline scan
PFFG-001: Foundation Final Gate Reader runs source redline scan

implementation_requirements.file_discovery: Recursively scan specified directories, filter by file patterns, skip binary files and build artifacts
implementation_requirements.performance: Scan 1000+ files in < 10 seconds, memory usage < 100MB, parallel scanning, incremental scanning
